growth_records.medium: Optimised LMO-812 (defined marine medium) + 5 mM glucose

up.method: glucose oxidase-peroxidase assay of culture supernatant (Boxbio AKSU001)

mfa.note: EDP dominant; PS1 lacks phosphofructokinase so cannot run complete EMPP

growth_records.cite: Yuxue Yang et al. Metabolic Flux Analysis Reveals Entner-Doudoroff Pathway Dominance in Heterotrophic Deep-Sea Bacterial Isolates. Environmental Microbiology Reports (2026). DOI:10.1111/1758-2229.70379. [PMC13261371]
growth_records.method: reported (max specific growth rate from OD600 exponential phase, 0.307 +/- 0.009 /h); doubling time CALCULATED td=ln2/mu=0.693/0.307=2.26 h
growth_records.snippet: the maximum specific growth rates are 0.307 +/- 0.009 h-1 ... for the respective strains ... PS1 3.35 +/- 1.28 (Glucose consumption rate umol/h) ... Biomass yield 0.55 +/- 0.04 CDW g/g of glucose
growth_records.notes: 13C-MFA paper (parallel 1-13C, U-13C6, mixtures). mu reported 0.307/h; td=ln2/mu=0.693/0.307=2.26 h. Glucose consumption 3.35 umol/h is per-culture (Table 2, units umol/h as printed; volume not given so cannot convert to mmol/gDW/h without biomass mass). Yxs=0.55 g CDW/g glucose. MFA ratios from Table 3 (INCA) and Fig 2. No product secretion measured (acetate & CO2 treated as non-balanced in model, not quantified). Temp 35C = optimal isolation temp; glucose 5 mM sole C source. Harvest 16 h, OD600 0.25.

carbon_growth.medium: Optimised LMO-812 (defined marine medium) + 5 mM glucose
carbon_growth.citation: Yuxue Yang et al. Metabolic Flux Analysis Reveals Entner-Doudoroff Pathway Dominance in Heterotrophic Deep-Sea Bacterial Isolates. Environmental Microbiology Reports (2026). DOI:10
